g.text: Everyone knows what is to do until the GoLive

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: We are confident that this is achievable, and we have an idea how this is achievable.

text.font-family: "Noto Sans", Helvetica, OpenSans, Arial, sans-serif, Noto Sans Hebrew, Noto Sans, Noto Sans JP, Noto Sans KR

g.text: All User Stories have a rough estimate.

g.text: We are deriving our teamsetup from these estimates.

g.text: We defined risks, potential blockers and assumptions for our implementation.
